title: Narayana Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Group family as a Subject Matter Expert in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Group:
Narayana Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group!
